name: pict-mcm-example-bookstore-connections
description: Example: manage connections to the meadow bookstore test databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite)

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy
scripts.test: echo "Run: docker compose up -d && npm start" && exit 0

author: Steven Velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Bookstore Connections
ExampleApplication.Summary: Manage connections to the meadow bookstore test databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite).

brand.Name: Bookstore Connections
brand.Tagline: Manage meadow connections for the bookstore demo
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-pict-meadow-connection-manager_bookstore-connections-filled-light">
				<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z" fill="#9df342"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-meadow-connection-manager_bookstore-connections-filled-light)"><circle cx="48" cy="48" r="36" fill="none" stroke="#42b3e7" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.45"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="22" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
					<circle cx="24.92" cy="75.63" r="9" fill="#42b3e7"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="22" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PMCM</text>
	</svg>
